title: Clean Up Your GitHub Account
description: I ended up with more than 100 abandoned GitHub repos, so I built github-smash, a GitHub Actions cleanup tool that deletes anything not on a whitelist.

title: Mass Uninstall iOS Apps with Apple Configurator on Mac
description: Stop removing apps one by one — Apple Configurator lets you select and uninstall multiple apps from iOS devices in a single action, saving significant time when managing many devices or doing a spring clean.

title: Zero-Downtime Deployments with Kubernetes Rolling Updates
description: Learn how to configure Kubernetes rolling updates and readiness probes to keep your applications available during every deployment.
